instruction: For Dublin, the next step and recurring daily check are already covered. Use the forecast and today's Europe/Dublin calendar to work out whether this stays live or moves async, and only send manager@example.com an update if it moves async.
canonical_instruction: Some of the Dublin ops setup is already in place. Review the forecast, today's Europe/Dublin calendar, the task already on the board, and the recurring daily check schedule before working out whether this should stay live or move async, and send manager@example.com the update if you move it async.
